goal: Add a side-effect-free mount preparation for a future cockpit read-only source selector, requiring a ready BPK-035 contract, default-off env gate, and source selector reference without changing routes, renderer, server files, runtime, or actions.
scope_out: Do not change cockpit route, renderer, server mount, runtime route, provider, DB, package, workflow, or deployment files.
Do not make cockpit actions executable.
claims: Cockpit source mount can be prepared without mounting.
Source selector and default-off env gate are required.
assumptions: Actual server mount remains a later UI/runtime task.
dod: Ready, missing selector, and blocked contract cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route changes, renderer changes, server changes, runtime changes, provider calls, DB calls, package changes, workflow changes, or executable actions become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-035 decided future cockpit route source eligibility. BPK-039 may prepare mount requirements without route mutation.
